guide:
## Quest Guide: Crethley Manor Hunt and Gather

**Level:** 20-27  
**Class:** All  
**NPC:** Elzilor Marbe  
**Location:** Crethley Manor  

Log this Hunt and Gather quest with **Elzilor Marbe**, located south of the lake in a farmyard. She asks you to return to her with **Runes of Crethley Manor**.

The **Crethley Manor house** is located in the northern part of the Crethley Manor zone (one zone south and east of Wyndhaven), north of the lake.

**Targets:** Zombies, Skeletons, and The Maid drop the Rune of Crethley Manor. Farm a full stack and turn it in to Elzilor.

**Reward:** 250k XP without luck.
